mapper.sql: select id, user_id, order_id, open_id, amount, type, status, token, `time`, remark from zhs_commission_flow
mapper.select: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN status = 0 AND order_status = 2 THEN amount ELSE 0 END) AS Withdrawable, -- 可提现 SUM(CASE WHEN status = 1 THEN amount ELSE 0 END) AS Withdrawn, -- 已提现 SUM(CASE WHEN order_status = 0 THEN amount ELSE 0 END) AS PendingSettlementAmount, -- 待结算金额 SUM(CASE WHEN order_status = 0 AND time >= UNIX_TIMESTAMP(CURDATE()) AND time < UNIX_TIMESTAMP(DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)) THEN amount ELSE 0 END) AS TodayCommission, -- 今日佣金 SUM(CASE WHEN order_status=0 or order_status=2 THEN amount ELSE 0 END ) as AccumulatedCommission -- 累计佣金 FROM zhs_commission_flow WHERE belongers_open_id = #{token};
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO zhs_commission_flow (user_id, invited_user_id, amount, time, remark) VALUES (#{userId}, #{invitedUserId}, #{amount}, #{time}, #{remark})

INSERT INTO zhs_commission_flow (user_id, order_id, open_id, amount, type, token, time, remark,belongers_open_id)
(#{item.userId}, #{item.orderId}, #{item.openId}, #{item.amount}, #{item.type}, #{item.token}, #{item.time}, #{item.remark}, #{item.belongersOpenId})
mapper.update:
update zhs_commission_flow f set f.`status` = 2 where f.id in
#{id}
